input.subject: Re: Project Kickoff Call - GlobalTech Partnership
input.snippet: Thanks for confirming. Here are the call details...
input.body_text:
Hi team,

Thanks for confirming. Here are the call details for our project kickoff:

Project Kickoff: GlobalTech Partnership
Date: Monday, February 10, 2026
Time: 11:00 AM - 12:30 PM PST

Microsoft Teams Meeting
Join link: https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/xyz123
Meeting ID: 456 789 0123
Passcode: kickoff

Dial-in: +1 (800) 555-0199
Conference ID: 789 456#

Attendees:
- GlobalTech: James Wong, Sarah Kim, Michael Chen
- Your Team: TBD

Agenda:
1. Introductions (10 min)
2. Project scope review (30 min)
3. Timeline and milestones (20 min)
4. Q&A and next steps (30 min)

Please send over your attendee list by Friday.

Looking forward to it!

Best,
James Wong
Director of Partnerships
GlobalTech Inc.

notes: Client kickoff call with detailed agenda and dial-in info
